creator: mac@flab.fujitsu.co.jp
text:
I'm mac, same as mac@jp.freebsd.org, this ports Originator.

I update Window Maker i18n ports for following x11-wm/windowmaker.
I append uuencoded file on this mail.

Thank you.

-- 
mac@flab.fujitsu.co.jp/mac@jp.freebsd.org
